name: School Trip X King Game
description:
When your school went on a field trip, you never expected your crush to invite you to her room in the middle of the night. What you expected even less was for her to invite the resident lady's man and the shy girl of the school as well. Now what was supposed to be your alone time with your crush is instead a party of 4 riled up, horny students with all night to spare.

Hayami is living the life of party and having fun. Sakura is looking out of her league and at you nonstop. Kudou is trying to have sex with all the girls while being a good friend. And now you have to figure out how to survive the night.
creator: NightHawk72j
